variables.input:
fetch metrics
| filter matchesPhrase(metric.key, "snmp")
| summarize by: {snmp_host}
| fields snmp_host

fetch metrics
| filter matchesPhrase(metric.key, "snmp")
| summarize by: {snmp_device}
| fields snmp_device

fetch metrics
| filter matchesPhrase(metric.key, "snmp.if")
| summarize by: {interface}
| fields interface

header_main.content:
# 📡 [SNMP] Generic Device Dashboard
Dashboard genérico para monitoramento de dispositivos via SNMP. Use as variáveis acima para filtrar por host, device ou interface específicos.

table_device_status.title: Device Interface Status (Admin vs Oper)
table_device_status.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key == "snmp.ifAdminStatus" or metric.key == "snmp.ifOperStatus"
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| summarize adminStatus = avg(if(metric.key=="snmp.ifAdminStatus", value, null)),
            operStatus  = avg(if(metric.key=="snmp.ifOperStatus",  value, null)),
            by: {snmp_device, snmp_host}
| fieldsAdd status = adminStatus - operStatus

table_uptime.title: System Uptime by Device (days)
table_uptime.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key == "snmp.sysUpTimeInstance"
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| summarize uptimeDays = min(value) / 8640000, by: {snmp_device, snmp_host}
| sort uptimeDays asc

header_interfaces.content:
## 🔌 Interfaces & Bandwidth
> **Fórmula Inbound Bandwidth Utilization (%):** `(ifHCInOctets.rate * 8 * 100) / (ifHighSpeed * 1000000)`
> **Fórmula Outbound Bandwidth Utilization (%):** `(ifHCOutOctets.rate * 8 * 100) / (ifHighSpeed * 1000000)`

table_interfaces.title: Device Interfaces — Speed, Octets In/Out
table_interfaces.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key in ("snmp.ifSpeed", "snmp.ifHighSpeed", "snmp.ifHCInOctets", "snmp.ifHCOutOctets")
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| filter in(interface, array($interface))
| summarize ifSpeed       = max(if(metric.key=="snmp.ifSpeed",       value, null)),
            ifHighSpeed   = max(if(metric.key=="snmp.ifHighSpeed",   value, null)),
            octetsIn      = max(if(metric.key=="snmp.ifHCInOctets",  value, null)),
            octetsOut     = max(if(metric.key=="snmp.ifHCOutOctets", value, null)),
            by: {snmp_device, snmp_host, interface}
| sort octetsIn desc

chart_inbound_bw.title: Inbound Bandwidth Utilization (%)
chart_inbound_bw.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key == "snmp.ifHCInOctets" or metric.key == "snmp.ifHighSpeed"
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| filter in(interface, array($interface))
| summarize inOctets  = avg(if(metric.key=="snmp.ifHCInOctets",  value, null)),
            highSpeed = avg(if(metric.key=="snmp.ifHighSpeed",    value, null)),
            by: {bin(timestamp, 1m), snmp_host, interface}
| fieldsAdd inboundBwUtil = (inOctets * 8.0 * 100.0) / (highSpeed * 1000000.0)
| fields timestamp, snmp_host, interface, inboundBwUtil

chart_outbound_bw.title: Outbound Bandwidth Utilization (%)
chart_outbound_bw.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key == "snmp.ifHCOutOctets" or metric.key == "snmp.ifHighSpeed"
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| filter in(interface, array($interface))
| summarize outOctets = avg(if(metric.key=="snmp.ifHCOutOctets", value, null)),
            highSpeed = avg(if(metric.key=="snmp.ifHighSpeed",   value, null)),
            by: {bin(timestamp, 1m), snmp_host, interface}
| fieldsAdd outboundBwUtil = (outOctets * 8.0 * 100.0) / (highSpeed * 1000000.0)
| fields timestamp, snmp_host, interface, outboundBwUtil

chart_inbound_packets.title: Average Inbound Packets (Broadcast + Multicast)
chart_inbound_packets.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key == "snmp.ifHCInBroadcastPkts" or metric.key == "snmp.ifHCInMulticastPkts"
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| filter in(interface, array($interface))
| summarize avgPackets = avg(value), by: {bin(timestamp, 1m), snmp_host, interface, metric.key}
| fields timestamp, snmp_host, interface, metric.key, avgPackets

chart_outbound_packets.title: Average Outbound Packets (Broadcast + Multicast)
chart_outbound_packets.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key == "snmp.ifHCOutBroadcastPkts" or metric.key == "snmp.ifHCOutMulticastPkts"
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| filter in(interface, array($interface))
| summarize avgPackets = avg(value), by: {bin(timestamp, 1m), snmp_host, interface, metric.key}
| fields timestamp, snmp_host, interface, metric.key, avgPackets

chart_inbound_octets.title: Average Inbound Octets (bytes)
chart_inbound_octets.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key == "snmp.ifHCInOctets"
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| filter in(interface, array($interface))
| summarize avgOctets = avg(value), by: {bin(timestamp, 1m), snmp_host, interface}
| fields timestamp, snmp_host, interface, avgOctets

chart_outbound_octets.title: Average Outbound Octets (bytes)
chart_outbound_octets.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key == "snmp.ifHCOutOctets"
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| filter in(interface, array($interface))
| summarize avgOctets = avg(value), by: {bin(timestamp, 1m), snmp_host, interface}
| fields timestamp, snmp_host, interface, avgOctets

toplist_inbound_errors.title: Top 15 — Inbound Interface Errors by Device (packets)
toplist_inbound_errors.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key == "snmp.ifInErrors"
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| summarize totalErrors = sum(value), by: {snmp_host}
| sort totalErrors desc
| limit 15

toplist_outbound_errors.title: Top 15 — Outbound Interface Errors by Device (packets)
toplist_outbound_errors.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key == "snmp.ifOutErrors"
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| summarize totalErrors = sum(value), by: {snmp_host}
| sort totalErrors desc
| limit 15

chart_mem_util.title: Average Memory Utilization (%)
chart_mem_util.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key == "snmp.cpmCPUMemoryUsed" or metric.key == "snmp.cpmCPUMemoryFree"
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| summarize memUsed = avg(if(metric.key=="snmp.cpmCPUMemoryUsed", value, null)),
            memFree = avg(if(metric.key=="snmp.cpmCPUMemoryFree", value, null)),
            by: {bin(timestamp, 1m), snmp_host}
| fieldsAdd memUtil = (memUsed / (memUsed + memFree)) * 100.0
| fields timestamp, snmp_host, memUtil

chart_cpu_util.title: Average CPU Utilization (%)
chart_cpu_util.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key in ("snmp.cpmCPUTotalMonIntervalValue", "snmp.hrProcessorLoad", "snmp.cpmCPUTotal1minRev")
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| summarize avgCpu = avg(value), by: {bin(timestamp, 1m), snmp_host, metric.key}
| fields timestamp, snmp_host, metric.key, avgCpu

chart_udp_in.title: Average Inbound UDP Datagrams
chart_udp_in.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key == "snmp.udpHCInDatagrams"
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| summarize avgVal = avg(value), by: {bin(timestamp, 1m), snmp_host}
| fields timestamp, snmp_host, avgVal

chart_tcp_active_opens.title: Average Number of Successful TCP Connections
chart_tcp_active_opens.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key == "snmp.tcpActiveOpens"
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| summarize avgVal = avg(value), by: {bin(timestamp, 1m), snmp_host}
| fields timestamp, snmp_host, avgVal

chart_tcp_resets.title: Average Number of TCP Connections Reset
chart_tcp_resets.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key == "snmp.tcpEstabResets"
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| summarize avgVal = avg(value), by: {bin(timestamp, 1m), snmp_host}
| fields timestamp, snmp_host, avgVal

chart_tcp_in_segs.title: Average Number of Inbound TCP Segments
chart_tcp_in_segs.query:
fetch metrics, from: now()-2h
| filter metric.key == "snmp.tcpHCInSegs"
| filter in(snmp_host, array($snmp_host))
| summarize avgVal = avg(value), by: {bin(timestamp, 1m), snmp_host}
| fields timestamp, snmp_host, avgVal
